networkError: Network error. Please check your connection.
serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.
invalidInput: Invalid input. Please check your data.
sessionExpired: Session expired. Please start a new session.
rateLimited: Rate limited. Please wait and try again.
contextLimitExceeded: Context limit exceeded. Consider compacting the conversation.
errorOccurredInVersion: An error occurred in AGIME v{{version}}.

rateLimit.title: API rate limit or quota reached
rateLimit.hint: The model provider rejected the request because too many requests were sent or the account's quota/credits are used up. Wait for the limit to reset, check your provider quota, or switch to a model with available capacity.

auth.title: Authentication failed
auth.hint: The model provider rejected the credentials. Check that the API key is correct and still valid in Settings.

contextLimit.title: Conversation too long for the model
contextLimit.hint: The request exceeded the model's context window. Compact the conversation or start a new session, then try again.

timeout.title: Provider timed out or is unreachable
timeout.hint: The model provider didn't respond in time or the connection failed. Check your network and try again in a moment.
